error.signature: cv2.error: DNN module was not built with CUDA backend; switched to CPU

verdict.summary: OpenCV DNN module does not have the requested backend (CUDA, OpenVINO). Built without that support.

dead_ends.action: Install CUDA toolkit expecting opencv-python pip package to use it
dead_ends.why_fails: pip opencv-python is built without CUDA. You need opencv-contrib-python built from source with CUDA flags.

dead_ends.action: Set backend to CUDA in code without checking availability
dead_ends.why_fails: Falls back to CPU silently or throws error. Always check getLayerTypes() or getBuildInformation().

workarounds.action: Build OpenCV from source with CUDA flags
Use CPU backend which is always available
Check build info to see which backends are available
workarounds.how: print(cv2.getBuildInformation())  # look for CUDA, OpenVINO under DNN section
